title: Tokyo Japan Experience 2026
details: Highlights: Asakusa Sensoji Temple, Nakamise Street, Tokyo Skytree (photo stop), Shibuya Crossing, Hachiko Statue, Mt. Fuji View Spot, Oishi Park at Lake Kawaguchi, Oshino Hakkai, Odaiba (Gundam, Liberty Statue, Rainbow Bridge), and Gotemba Premium Outlet. A perfectly balanced Tokyo city and Mt. Fuji countryside adventure.

itinerary.day_details: Departure from Manila via Cebu Pacific flight 5J-5054 (MNL–NRT 06:10AM–11:35AM). Arrival at Narita Airport, meet and greet with tour guide. Transfer to Tokyo (approx. 1 hr 40 mins). Hotel check-in (from 3:00 PM). Free time.

Visit Asakusa Sensoji Temple and Nakamise Street. Photo stop at Tokyo Skytree. Visit Shibuya Crossing and Hachiko Statue. Continue to Odaiba (Gundam Statue, Liberty Statue, Rainbow Bridge). Return to hotel.

Hotel check-out and transfer to Mt. Fuji area (approx. 3 hrs). Visit Oishi Park in Lake Kawaguchi (Mt. Fuji view spot) and Oshino Hakkai. Shopping stop at Gotemba Premium Outlet. Transfer back to Tokyo (approx. 3 hrs).
Free time for leisure and shopping. Optional tour: Tokyo Disneyland or DisneySea (own expense).
Hotel check-out. Free time until transfer to Narita Airport (approx. 1 hr 40 mins). Departure back to Manila via Cebu Pacific flight 5J-5058 (NRT–MNL 07:25PM–11:35PM). Home sweet home!

inclusions: English-speaking tour guide during tours and transfers
Private coach airport to hotel transfers
extra_details: Child with Bed (7 y/o & above): Same as adult rate
Mode of Payment: ₱15,000 per person down payment. Remaining balance payable 45 days before departure.
